  "text": "The CRD validation schema to OpenAPI schema publishing chain in kubernetes/kubernetes involves the following components:\n\n## 1. CRD Validation Spec Definition\n\nThe CRD validation schema is defined in the API types:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/types.go` — internal `CustomResourceValidation` type with `OpenAPIV3Schema *JSONSchemaProps`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1/types.go` — v1 `CustomResourceValidation` type\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1beta1/types.go` — v1beta1 equivalent\n\nValidation of these schemas is done in:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/validation.go` — validates CRD spec, requires structural schemas in v1\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/cel_validation.go` — CEL rule validation within schemas\n\n## 2. Structural Schema Extraction\n\nThe structural schema package converts the JSONSchemaProps to an internal Structural representation:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/structural.go` — defines the `Structural` type\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/convert.go` — implements `NewStructural()` which converts `apiextensions.JSONSchemaProps` to `*Structural`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/validation.go` — implements `ValidateStructural()` which validates the structural schema\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/unfold.go` — implements `Unfold()` which expands ValueValidation (anyOf/allOf)\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/complete.go` — schema completion logic\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/skeleton.go` — structural skeleton construction\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/visitor.go` — visitor pattern for traversing structural schemas\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/kubeopenapi.go` — implements `ToKubeOpenAPI()` which converts a `Structural` back to a go-openapi `spec.Schema`\n\n## 3. OpenAPI V3 and V2 Schema Conversion\n\nThe conversion from Structural schema to OpenAPI spec is done in the builder:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/builder/builder.go` — contains `generateBuilder()`, `BuildOpenAPIV2()`, and `BuildOpenAPIV3()`. The `generateBuilder` function calls `apiextensionshelpers.GetSchemaForVersion()` to get the CRD schema, converts it to internal form, calls `NewStructural()`, then `Unfold()`, and optionally strips value validations. `BuildOpenAPIV2` and `BuildOpenAPIV3` then produce OpenAPI specs from the restful routes and schema.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/v2/conversion.go` — implements `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` which strips OpenAPI v2-incompatible fields (allOf, oneOf, anyOf, not, nullable, etc.) from the structural schema before calling `ToKubeOpenAPI()`.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/builder/merge.go` — implements `MergeSpecs()` (v2) and `MergeSpecsV3()` (v3) for merging per-version CRD specs together and with the static spec.\n\n## 4. API Server Spec Endpoint Publication\n\nThe controllers watch CRD changes and publish the OpenAPI specs:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/controller.go` — `Controller` (v2): watches CRD informer, calls `BuildOpenAPIV2` per version, merges specs, and calls `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy(cache)` to publish to the `/openapi/v2` endpoint\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/metrics.go` — metrics for OpenAPI v2 regeneration\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/controller.go` — `Controller` (v3): watches CRD informer, calls `BuildOpenAPIV3` per version, merges specs per GroupVersion, and calls `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion(path, mergedSpec)` to publish to the `/openapi/v3` endpoint\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/metrics.go` — metrics for OpenAPI v3 regeneration\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/util.go` — utility for converting GroupVersion to OpenAPI v3 path (`apis/<group>/<version>`)\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/nonstructuralschema/nonstructuralschema_controller.go` — watches CRDs and sets the `NonStructuralSchema` condition, which prevents non-structural schemas from being published\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go` — wires everything together in `AddPostStartHookOrDie(\"start-apiextensions-controllers\", ...)`, launching both the v2 and v3 OpenAPI controllers using `GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIVersionedService` and `GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIV3VersionedService`\n\n## Complete Chain Summary\n\n1. `CustomResourceValidation.OpenAPIV3Schema` (in CRD spec, `v1/types.go`) is the input\n2. `validation.go` validates the CRD including schema constraints\n3. `convert.go:NewStructural()` converts `JSONSchemaProps` → `*Structural` (the internal representation)\n4. `validation.go:ValidateStructural()` confirms it's a structural schema\n5. `unfold.go:Unfold()` expands value validations (anyOf, allOf etc.)\n6. For v2: `v2/conversion.go:ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` strips v2-incompatible constructs, then `kubeopenapi.go:ToKubeOpenAPI()` converts to go-openapi spec.Schema\n7. `builder/builder.go:BuildOpenAPIV2()` / `BuildOpenAPIV3()` build full OpenAPI swagger/spec3 documents using kube-openapi builders\n8. `builder/merge.go:MergeSpecs()` / `MergeSpecsV3()` merge per-CRD specs with the static built-in spec\n9. `controller/openapi/controller.go:updateSpecLocked()` calls `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy()` to publish merged v2 spec\n10. `controller/openapiv3/controller.go:updateGroupVersion()` calls `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion()` to publish merged v3 spec per group/version\n11. `apiserver/apiserver.go` starts both controllers as post-start hooks, connecting them to the generic API server's `OpenAPIVersionedService` and `OpenAPIV3VersionedService` which serve `/openapi/v2` and `/openapi/v3` endpoints\n"
}

41: 	informers "k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/client/informers/externalversions/apiextensions/v1"
42: 	listers "k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/client/listers/apiextensions/v1"

45: 
46: // Controller watches CustomResourceDefinitions and publishes validation schema
47: type Controller struct {
48: 	crdLister  listers.CustomResourceDefinitionLister
49: 	crdsSynced cache.InformerSynced
50: 
51: 	// To allow injection for testing.
52: 	syncFn func(string) error
53: 
54: 	queue workqueue.TypedRateLimitingInterface[string]
55: 
56: 	staticSpec *spec.Swagger
57: 
58: 	openAPIService *handler.OpenAPIService
59: 
60: 	// specs by name. The specs are lazily constructed on request.
61: 	// The lock is for the map only.
62: 	lock        sync.Mutex
63: 	specsByName map[string]*specCache
64: }
65: 
66: // specCache holds the merged version spec for a CRD as well as the CRD object.
67: // The spec is created lazily from the CRD object on request.
68: // The mergedVersionSpec is only created on instantiation and is never
69: // changed. crdCache is a cached.Replaceable and updates are thread
70: // safe. Thus, no lock is needed to protect this struct.
71: type specCache struct {
72: 	crdCache          cached.LastSuccess[*apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition]
73: 	mergedVersionSpec cached.Value[*spec.Swagger]
74: }
75: 
76: func (s *specCache) update(crd *apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition) {
77: 	s.crdCache.Store(cached.Static(crd, generateCRDHash(crd)))
78: }
79: 
80: func createSpecCache(crd *apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition) *specCache {
81: 	s := specCache{}
82: 	s.update(crd)
83: 
84: 	s.mergedVersionSpec = cached.Transform[*apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition](func(crd *apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition, etag string, err error) (*spec.Swagger, string, error) {
85: 		if err != nil {
86: 			// This should never happen, but return the err if it does.
87: 			return nil, "", err
88: 		}
89: 		mergeSpec := &spec.Swagger{}
90: 		for _, v := range crd.Spec.Versions {
91: 			if !v.Served {
92: 				continue
93: 			}
94: 			s, err := builder.BuildOpenAPIV2(crd, v.Name, builder.Options{
95: 				V2:                      true,
96: 				IncludeSelectableFields: utilfeature.DefaultFeatureGate.Enabled(apiextensionsfeatures.CustomResourceFieldSelectors),
97: 			})
98: 			// Defaults must be pruned here for CRDs to cleanly merge with the static
99: 			// spec that already has defaults pruned
100: 			if err != nil {
101: 				return nil, "", err
102: 			}
103: 			s.Definitions = handler.PruneDefaults(s.Definitions)
104: 			mergeSpec, err = builder.MergeSpecs(mergeSpec, s)
105: 			if err != nil {
106: 				return nil, "", err
107: 			}
108: 		}
109: 		return mergeSpec, generateCRDHash(crd), nil
110: 	}, &s.crdCache)
111: 	return &s
112: }
113: 
114: // NewController creates a new Controller with input CustomResourceDefinition informer
115: func NewController(crdInformer informers.CustomResourceDefinitionInformer) *Controller {
116: 	c := &Controller{
117: 		crdLister:  crdInformer.Lister(),
118: 		crdsSynced: crdInformer.Informer().HasSynced,
119: 		queue: workqueue.NewTypedRateLimitingQueueWithConfig(
120: 			workqueue.DefaultTypedControllerRateLimiter[string](),
121: 			workqueue.TypedRateLimitingQueueConfig[string]{Name: "crd_openapi_controller"},
122: 		),
123: 		specsByName: map[string]*specCache{},
124: 	}
125: 
126: 	crdInformer.Informer().AddEventHandler(cache.ResourceEventHandlerFuncs{
127: 		AddFunc:    c.addCustomResourceDefinition,
128: 		UpdateFunc: c.updateCustomResourceDefinition,
129: 		DeleteFunc: c.deleteCustomResourceDefinition,
130: 	})
131: 
132: 	c.syncFn = c.sync
133: 	return c
134: }
135: 
136: // Run sets openAPIAggregationManager and starts workers
137: func (c *Controller) Run(staticSpec *spec.Swagger, openAPIService *handler.OpenAPIService, stopCh <-chan struct{}) {
138: 	defer utilruntime.HandleCrash()
139: 	defer c.queue.ShutDown()
140: 	defer klog.Infof("Shutting down OpenAPI controller")
141: 
142: 	klog.Infof("Starting OpenAPI controller")
143: 
144: 	c.staticSpec = staticSpec
145: 	c.openAPIService = openAPIService
146: 
147: 	if !cache.WaitForCacheSync(stopCh, c.crdsSynced) {
148: 		utilruntime.HandleError(fmt.Errorf("timed out waiting for caches to sync"))
149: 		return
150: 	}
151: 
152: 	// create initial spec to avoid merging once per CRD on startup
153: 	crds, err := c.crdLister.List(labels.Everything())
154: 	if err != nil {
155: 		utilruntime.HandleError(fmt.Errorf("failed to initially list all CRDs: %v", err))
156: 		return
157: 	}
158: 	for _, crd := range crds {
159: 		if !apiextensionshelpers.IsCRDConditionTrue(crd, apiextensionsv1.Established) {
160: 			continue
161: 		}
162: 		c.specsByName[crd.Name] = createSpecCache(crd)
163: 	}
164: 	c.updateSpecLocked()
165: 
166: 	// only start one worker thread since its a slow moving API
167: 	go wait.Until(c.runWorker, time.Second, stopCh)
168: 
169: 	<-stopCh
170: }
171: 
172: func (c *Controller) runWorker() {
173: 	for c.processNextWorkItem() {
174: 	}
175: }
176: 
177: func (c *Controller) processNextWorkItem() bool {
178: 	key, quit := c.queue.Get()
179: 	if quit {
180: 		return false
181: 	}
182: 	defer c.queue.Done(key)
183: 
184: 	// log slow aggregations
185: 	start := time.Now()
186: 	defer func() {
187: 		elapsed := time.Since(start)
188: 		if elapsed > time.Second {
189: 			klog.Warningf("slow openapi aggregation of %q: %s", key, elapsed)
190: 		}
191: 	}()
192: 
193: 	err := c.syncFn(key)
194: 	if err == nil {
195: 		c.queue.Forget(key)
196: 		return true
197: 	}
198: 
199: 	utilruntime.HandleError(fmt.Errorf("%v failed with: %v", key, err))
200: 	c.queue.AddRateLimited(key)
201: 	return true
202: }
203: 
204: func (c *Controller) sync(name string) error {
205: 	c.lock.Lock()
206: 	defer c.lock.Unlock()
207: 
208: 	crd, err := c.crdLister.Get(name)
209: 	if err != nil && !errors.IsNotFound(err) {
210: 		return err
211: 	}
212: 
213: 	// do we have to remove all specs of this CRD?
214: 	if errors.IsNotFound(err) || !apiextensionshelpers.IsCRDConditionTrue(crd, apiextensionsv1.Established) {
215: 		if _, found := c.specsByName[name]; !found {
216: 			return nil
217: 		}
218: 		delete(c.specsByName, name)
219: 		klog.V(2).Infof("Updating CRD OpenAPI spec because %s was removed", name)
220: 		regenerationCounter.With(map[string]string{"crd": name, "reason": "remove"})
221: 		c.updateSpecLocked()
222: 		return nil
223: 	}
224: 
225: 	// If CRD spec already exists, update the CRD.
226: 	// specCache.update() includes the ETag so an update on a spec
227: 	// resulting in the same ETag will be a noop.
228: 	s, exists := c.specsByName[crd.Name]
229: 	if exists {
230: 		s.update(crd)
231: 		klog.V(2).Infof("Updating CRD OpenAPI spec because %s changed", name)
232: 		regenerationCounter.With(map[string]string{"crd": name, "reason": "update"})
233: 		return nil
234: 	}
235: 
236: 	c.specsByName[crd.Name] = createSpecCache(crd)
237: 	klog.V(2).Infof("Updating CRD OpenAPI spec because %s changed", name)
238: 	regenerationCounter.With(map[string]string{"crd": name, "reason": "add"})
239: 	c.updateSpecLocked()
240: 	return nil
241: }
242: 
243: // updateSpecLocked updates the cached spec graph.
244: func (c *Controller) updateSpecLocked() {
245: 	specList := make([]cached.Value[*spec.Swagger], 0, len(c.specsByName))
246: 	for crd := range c.specsByName {
247: 		specList = append(specList, c.specsByName[crd].mergedVersionSpec)
248: 	}
249: 
250: 	cache := cached.MergeList(func(results []cached.Result[*spec.Swagger]) (*spec.Swagger, string, error) {
251: 		localCRDSpec := make([]*spec.Swagger, 0, len(results))
252: 		for k := range results {
253: 			if results[k].Err == nil {
254: 				localCRDSpec = append(localCRDSpec, results[k].Value)
255: 			}
256: 		}
257: 		mergedSpec, err := builder.MergeSpecs(c.staticSpec, localCRDSpec...)
258: 		if err != nil {
259: 			return nil, "", fmt.Errorf("failed to merge specs: %v", err)
260: 		}
261: 		// A UUID is returned for the etag because we will only
262: 		// create a new merger when a CRD has changed. A hash based
263: 		// etag is more expensive because the CRDs are not
264: 		// premarshalled.
265: 		return mergedSpec, uuid.New().String(), nil
266: 	}, specList)
267: 	c.openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy(cache)
268: }
269: 
270: func (c *Controller) addCustomResourceDefinition(obj interface{}) {
271: 	castObj := obj.(*apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition)
272: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Adding customresourcedefinition %s", castObj.Name)
273: 	c.enqueue(castObj)
274: }
275: 
276: func (c *Controller) updateCustomResourceDefinition(oldObj, newObj interface{}) {
277: 	castNewObj := newObj.(*apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition)
278: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Updating customresourcedefinition %s", castNewObj.Name)
279: 	c.enqueue(castNewObj)
280: }
281: 
282: func (c *Controller) deleteCustomResourceDefinition(obj interface{}) {
283: 	castObj, ok := obj.(*apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition)
284: 	if !ok {
285: 		tombstone, ok := obj.(cache.DeletedFinalStateUnknown)
286: 		if !ok {
287: 			klog.Errorf("Couldn't get object from tombstone %#v", obj)
288: 			return
289: 		}
290: 		castObj, ok = tombstone.Obj.(*apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition)
291: 		if !ok {
292: 			klog.Errorf("Tombstone contained object that is not expected %#v", obj)
293: 			return
294: 		}
295: 	}
296: 	klog.V(4).Infof("Deleting customresourcedefinition %q", castObj.Name)
297: 	c.enqueue(castObj)
298: }
299: 
300: func (c *Controller) enqueue(obj *apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition) {
301: 	c.queue.Add(obj.Name)
302: }
303: 
304: func generateCRDHash(crd *apiextensionsv1.CustomResourceDefinition) string {
305: 	return fmt.Sprintf("%s,%d", crd.UID, crd.Generation)
306: }

  "text": "The CRD validation schema to OpenAPI schema publishing chain in kubernetes/kubernetes involves the following components:\n\n## 1. CRD Validation Spec Definition\n\nThe CRD validation schema is defined in the API types:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/types.go` — internal `CustomResourceValidation` type with `OpenAPIV3Schema *JSONSchemaProps`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1/types.go` — v1 `CustomResourceValidation` type\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1beta1/types.go` — v1beta1 equivalent\n\nValidation of these schemas is done in:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/validation.go` — validates CRD spec, requires structural schemas in v1\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/cel_validation.go` — CEL rule validation within schemas\n\n## 2. Structural Schema Extraction\n\nThe structural schema package converts the JSONSchemaProps to an internal Structural representation:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/structural.go` — defines the `Structural` type\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/convert.go` — implements `NewStructural()` which converts `apiextensions.JSONSchemaProps` to `*Structural`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/validation.go` — implements `ValidateStructural()` which validates the structural schema\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/unfold.go` — implements `Unfold()` which expands ValueValidation (anyOf/allOf)\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/complete.go` — schema completion logic\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/skeleton.go` — structural skeleton construction\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/visitor.go` — visitor pattern for traversing structural schemas\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/kubeopenapi.go` — implements `ToKubeOpenAPI()` which converts a `Structural` back to a go-openapi `spec.Schema`\n\n## 3.   "text": "The CRD validation schema to OpenAPI schema publishing chain in kubernetes/kubernetes involves the following components:\n\n## 1. CRD Validation Spec Definition\n\nThe CRD validation schema is defined in the API types:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/types.go` — internal `CustomResourceValidation` type with `OpenAPIV3Schema *JSONSchemaProps`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1/types.go` — v1 `CustomResourceValidation` type\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/v1beta1/types.go` — v1beta1 equivalent\n\nValidation of these schemas is done in:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/validation.go` — validates CRD spec, requires structural schemas in v1\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apis/apiextensions/validation/cel_validation.go` — CEL rule validation within schemas\n\n## 2. Structural Schema Extraction\n\nThe structural schema package converts the JSONSchemaProps to an internal Structural representation:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/structural.go` — defines the `Structural` type\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/convert.go` — implements `NewStructural()` which converts `apiextensions.JSONSchemaProps` to `*Structural`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/validation.go` — implements `ValidateStructural()` which validates the structural schema\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/unfold.go` — implements `Unfold()` which expands ValueValidation (anyOf/allOf)\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/complete.go` — schema completion logic\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/skeleton.go` — structural skeleton construction\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/visitor.go` — visitor pattern for traversing structural schemas\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/schema/kubeopenapi.go` — implements `ToKubeOpenAPI()` which converts a `Structural` back to a go-openapi `spec.Schema`\n\n## 3. OpenAPI V3 and V2 Schema Conversion\n\nThe conversion from Structural schema to OpenAPI spec is done in the builder:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/builder/builder.go` — contains `generateBuilder()`, `BuildOpenAPIV2()`, and `BuildOpenAPIV3()`. The `generateBuilder` function calls `apiextensionshelpers.GetSchemaForVersion()` to get the CRD schema, converts it to internal form, calls `NewStructural()`, then `Unfold()`, and optionally strips value validations. `BuildOpenAPIV2` and `BuildOpenAPIV3` then produce OpenAPI specs from the restful routes and schema.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/v2/conversion.go` — implements `ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` which strips OpenAPI v2-incompatible fields (allOf, oneOf, anyOf, not, nullable, etc.) from the structural schema before calling `ToKubeOpenAPI()`.\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/builder/merge.go` — implements `MergeSpecs()` (v2) and `MergeSpecsV3()` (v3) for merging per-version CRD specs together and with the static spec.\n\n## 4. API Server Spec Endpoint Publication\n\nThe controllers watch CRD changes and publish the OpenAPI specs:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/controller.go` — `Controller` (v2): watches CRD informer, calls `BuildOpenAPIV2` per version, merges specs, and calls `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy(cache)` to publish to the `/openapi/v2` endpoint\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapi/metrics.go` — metrics for OpenAPI v2 regeneration\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/controller.go` — `Controller` (v3): watches CRD informer, calls `BuildOpenAPIV3` per version, merges specs per GroupVersion, and calls `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion(path, mergedSpec)` to publish to the `/openapi/v3` endpoint\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/metrics.go` — metrics for OpenAPI v3 regeneration\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/util.go` — utility for converting GroupVersion to OpenAPI v3 path (`apis/<group>/<version>`)\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/nonstructuralschema/nonstructuralschema_controller.go` — watches CRDs and sets the `NonStructuralSchema` condition, which gates OpenAPI publishing\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go` — wires everything together in the `start-apiextensions-controllers` post-start hook, launching both the v2 and v3 OpenAPI controllers using `GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIVersionedService` and `GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIV3VersionedService`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/customresource_handler.go` — uses structural schema for validation and schema-aware serving of custom resources\n\n## Complete Chain Summary\n\n1. `CustomResourceValidation.OpenAPIV3Schema` (in CRD spec, `v1/types.go`) is the input\n2. `validation.go:ValidateCRDSpec()` validates the CRD including schema constraints (structural, types, CEL rules)\n3. `convert.go:NewStructural()` converts `JSONSchemaProps` to `*Structural` (the internal structural representation)\n4. `validation.go:ValidateStructural()` confirms it is a valid structural schema\n5. `unfold.go:Unfold()` expands value validations (anyOf, allOf etc.)\n6. For v2: `v2/conversion.go:ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` strips v2-incompatible constructs, then `kubeopenapi.go:ToKubeOpenAPI()` converts to go-openapi spec.Schema\n7. `builder/builder.go:BuildOpenAPIV2()` / `BuildOpenAPIV3()` build full OpenAPI swagger/spec3 documents using kube-openapi builders\n8. `builder/merge.go:MergeSpecs()` / `MergeSpecsV3()` merge per-CRD specs with the static built-in spec\n9. `controller/openapi/controller.go:updateSpecLocked()` calls `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy()` to publish merged v2 spec\n10. `controller/openapiv3/controller.go:updateGroupVersion()` calls `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion()` to publish merged v3 spec per group/version\n11. `apiserver/apiserver.go` starts both controllers as post-start hooks, connecting them to `OpenAPIVersionedService` and `OpenAPIV3VersionedService` which serve `/openapi/v2` and `/openapi/v3` endpoints\n"
}

OpenAPI v3 regeneration\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/openapiv3/util.go` — utility for converting GroupVersion to OpenAPI v3 path (`apis/<group>/<version>`)\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/controller/nonstructuralschema/nonstructuralschema_controller.go` — watches CRDs and sets the `NonStructuralSchema` condition, which gates OpenAPI publishing\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/apiserver.go` — wires everything together in the `start-apiextensions-controllers` post-start hook, launching both the v2 and v3 OpenAPI controllers using `GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIVersionedService` and `GenericAPIServer.OpenAPIV3VersionedService`\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/apiextensions-apiserver/pkg/apiserver/customresource_handler.go` — uses structural schema for validation and schema-aware serving of custom resources\n\n## Complete Chain Summary\n\n1. `CustomResourceValidation.OpenAPIV3Schema` (in CRD spec, `v1/types.go`) is the input\n2. `validation.go:ValidateCRDSpec()` validates the CRD including schema constraints (structural, types, CEL rules)\n3. `convert.go:NewStructural()` converts `JSONSchemaProps` to `*Structural` (the internal structural representation)\n4. `validation.go:ValidateStructural()` confirms it is a valid structural schema\n5. `unfold.go:Unfold()` expands value validations (anyOf, allOf etc.)\n6. For v2: `v2/conversion.go:ToStructuralOpenAPIV2()` strips v2-incompatible constructs, then `kubeopenapi.go:ToKubeOpenAPI()` converts to go-openapi spec.Schema\n7. `builder/builder.go:BuildOpenAPIV2()` / `BuildOpenAPIV3()` build full OpenAPI swagger/spec3 documents using kube-openapi builders\n8. `builder/merge.go:MergeSpecs()` / `MergeSpecsV3()` merge per-CRD specs with the static built-in spec\n9. `controller/openapi/controller.go:updateSpecLocked()` calls `openAPIService.UpdateSpecLazy()` to publish merged v2 spec\n10. `controller/openapiv3/controller.go:updateGroupVersion()` calls `openAPIV3Service.UpdateGroupVersion()` to publish merged v3 spec per group/version\n11. `apiserver/apiserver.go` starts both controllers as post-start hooks, connecting them to `OpenAPIVersionedService` and `OpenAPIV3VersionedService` which serve `/openapi/v2` and `/openapi/v3` endpoints\n"
